features: 500 Pack White Paper Napkins 2-Ply, 33x33cm - Compact and easy to use.
High-Quality Material: Premium 2-ply paper for extra durability and softness. Thick and absorbent to handle spills and messes effectively.
Elegant Design: Crisp white color adds a touch of sophistication to any table setting. Smooth texture for a luxurious feel.
Versatile Use: Ideal for parties, weddings, and special events. Perfect for everyday dining, including breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Suitable for both casual and formal occasions.
description: White Paper Napkins - 500 Pack, 2-Ply, 33x33cm, Soft and Absorbent Serviettes Napkins for Parties, Events, and Everyday Use
